copy.title: Denied Left-Wing Backdoor
copy.prompt: Your defender is blocking the pass on the other side.
copy.game_context: 4-on-4 half-court shell, ball reversal from the right slot, 14 on the shot clock.
copy.possession_setup: The ball is at the right slot. You are the left wing. The defense is denying your reversal — your defender's hand and foot are in the passing lane.
copy.decision_moment: Your defender steps into the passing lane, hand and foot extended, chest between ball and receiver.
copy.visible_cue: x2 has hand and foot in the lane, hips opened toward the sideline, chest between ball and receiver.
copy.best_read: Plant the outside foot and back-cut behind x2 to the front of the rim; passer leads you to the layup before x4 can rotate.
copy.explanation_md: **The Backdoor Window — other side.** A denial works the same on the left wing as the right. Your defender has his hand and foot in the way of the pass — he is blocking the pass, not the basket. The space behind him is open. Take a hard step toward the ball, then cut behind him to the rim. Show your hands. Watch his body, not your spot.

feedback.correct: Good read. Same denial, other side. You cut behind him for the layup.
feedback.partial: Stepping back kept the play alive. Next time, watch his body — if he's blocking the pass, cut behind him.
feedback.wrong: Watch his body. If your defender is blocking the pass, the space behind him is open.

self_review_checklist: Did I see his hand and foot blocking the pass?
Did I cut behind him, not in front?
Did I cut hard, like I wanted the layup?
Did I show my hands at the rim?
acceptable_reads: V-cut out to a deeper catch point. Possession kept, but the layup window is missed.
bad_reads: Stay on the wing and call for the ball — defender deflects the reversal.
Slow front cut — defender rides the route and the window closes.

back_cut_to_rim.label: Cut behind him to the basket.
back_cut_to_rim.feedback_text: Best read. The defender is blocking the pass, so the basket is open. Cut behind him.

v_cut_to_deeper_catch.label: Step back out and ask for the ball.
v_cut_to_deeper_catch.feedback_text: Okay. You kept the play alive, but you missed the open layup behind your defender.
v_cut_to_deeper_catch.partial_feedback_text: Stepping back keeps the play alive. The better read was to cut behind him for the layup.

stand_still.label: Stay still and call for the ball.
stand_still.feedback_text: Not yet. Your defender is in the way. If you stand still, he steals the pass.

front_cut.label: Cut in front of the defender.
front_cut.feedback_text: Not yet. Cutting in front lets him follow you. Cut behind him instead.
